name_cn:
Genuine quality
 The SERPENTI CABOCHON mini shoulder bag features a distinctive large-scale graphic pattern and bold metal texture details, radiating the brilliance of the SERPENTI world with its exquisite, practical, unique design and modern style.
This bag is equipped with an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap, serving as a handbag or clutch to achieve versatile styling suitable for both day and night.
Extra-small size with one storage compartment and one card slot. Engraved BVLGARI brand logo on the interior metal plate.
Model: 291085
Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 cm
